predictions.question: Which counties have the highest number of customer outages reported at one time?
Which ten customer outage records were the highest?
Which customer outage records were recorded in the calendar year after 2021?

sparql_interpretations.label: Single calendar year (2022)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The literal reading of 'the calendar year after 2021' is the single year 2022.

sparql_interpretations.label: Any year after 2021
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'After 2021' can also denote all years strictly later than 2021 (2022 onward).

predictions.question: Which nighttime-light images cover the Orlando-area county in 2025?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo: <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT ?image ?date
WHERE {
  ?county goo:fipsCode "12095" .
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:representsCounty ?county ;
         goo:acquisitionDateTime ?date .
  FILTER (?date >= "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime &&
          ?date <  "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: Orange County only
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The literal 'Orlando-area county' resolves to Orange County, Florida (FIPS 12095).
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo: <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT ?image ?date
WHERE {
  ?county goo:fipsCode "12095" .
  ?image a goo:NTLImage ;
         goo:representsCounty ?county ;
         goo:acquisitionDateTime ?date .
  FILTER (?date >= "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime &&
          ?date <  "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 10

sparql_interpretations.label: Greater Orlando metro counties
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The 'Orlando area' can also be read as the Orlando metro (Orange, Seminole, Osceola, Lake).

predictions.question: Which jurisdiction is represented by the customer record with FIPS code 12075 and on the 15th of August 2017 at 8:15 PM?
Which county is represented by the nighttime-light image recorded for FIPS code 12031 on the 21st of September 2020?
Which jurisdiction is represented by the first alphabetical order county in Florida on the 10th of the 3rd month in the last year of the 2010s?

sparql_interpretations.label: First-alphabetical Florida county (any data)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Literal reading: the alphabetically first county in Florida, regardless of records on that specific date.

sparql_interpretations.label: First-alphabetical FL county with an outage record on 2019-03-10
sparql_interpretations.rationale: The date scope can restrict the answer to the first-alphabetical FL county that has a CustomerOutageRecord on 2019-03-10.

predictions.question: When was this outage record recorded?
How many outages were recorded in the customer outage record for the Florida county with the seat in Bronson, on August 15, 2017 at 20:15?
Which nighttime-light scene corresponds to the customer outage record for the Florida county with the seat in Bronson, on August 15, 2017 at 20:15?
Which outage map corresponds to the customer outage record for the Florida county with the largest city being Williston, on August 15, 2017 at 20:15?
Which severity prediction map was derived from the nighttime-light scene for Jacksonville's county in 2020, the 21st night of September?
Which satellite captured any random NTL image?
Which sensor captured any random NTL image?
During the Hurricane Ian disruption period, which outage records for the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers were above 100?

sparql_interpretations.label: Hurricane Ian event-time window (KG-derived)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: bind the disruption period to the ontology's own eventStartTime and eventEndTime of Hurricane Ian.

sparql_interpretations.label: Extended Ian response window (Sept 26 - Oct 5 2022)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'Disruption period' may extend beyond the event's official lifecycle to cover the post-landfall response window.

predictions.question: During the Hurricane Ian landfall date, which nighttime-light scenes line up with outage snapshots for the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers?
Which severity maps correspond to the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers around Hurricane Ian?

sparql_interpretations.label: Maps within Hurricane Ian event window
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'around Hurricane Ian' is treated as the ontology event start/end window.

sparql_interpretations.label: Maps on the Florida landfall day only
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A narrower reading restricts 'around' to the Florida landfall day (2022-09-28).
sparql_interpretations.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo: <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT ?map ?image ?date
WHERE {
  ?county goo:fipsCode "12071" .
  ?map a goo:OutageMap ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:generatedFromNTLImage ?image .
  ?image goo:acquisitionDateTime ?date .
  FILTER (?date >= "2022-09-28T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime &&
          ?date <  "2022-09-29T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: For each county, what is the maximum number of customer outages recorded in the year Hurricane Irma occurred in?
For each second-level administrative division in the U.S., what is their average social vulnerability index?
On what date and time did each jurisdiction reach its maximum recorded number of customer outages?
Which remote sensing machine and instrument captured any random nighttime-light image in the GeoOutage dataset?
Which U.S. county is depicted in the power outage severity map corresponding to a specific customer outage record?
What is the maximum number of power outages recorded for the county in the third most populous state named after Andrew Jackson in the Eagle-I dataset?

sparql_interpretations.label: Jackson County label match in FL
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'county named after Andrew Jackson' resolved by label match 'Jackson' in the third most populous state (Florida).

sparql_interpretations.label: Jackson County, FL by FIPS code
sparql_interpretations.rationale: More precise: bind directly to Jackson County, FL via FIPS 12063 rather than label matching.

predictions.question: Is there an EAGLE-I snapshot for the Tampa, Florida county that also has a matching NTL scene?
For the central-Florida county where the largest city is named Clermont, what derived severity maps are associated with the VIIRS-captured scene for the month of March in 2024?
How many tropical cyclones were active on the date 6 October 2024 in the Atlantic basin, and what were their names and maximum sustained wind speeds?

On Ian's Florida landfall day, what was the peak outage count in the southwest Florida county centered on Fort Myers, and were any hurricanes active within the general area of the county that day, and if so what were their names?

sparql_interpretations.label: Tight proximity (~1 degree, ~110 km)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'general area' interpreted as a ~1-degree lat/lon window from county centroid.

sparql_interpretations.label: Broader regional proximity (~3 degrees)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A wider 'regional' reading uses a ~3-degree lat/lon proximity window.

predictions.question: On the day of the Moore tornado, how many tornado records occurred in or within the general area of Cleveland County, Oklahoma, and what were their EF ratings and injury counts?

sparql_interpretations.label: In-county or within ~1-degree proximity
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'in or within the general area' covers occurredInCounty plus a 1-degree lat/lon buffer.

sparql_interpretations.label: Strictly within Cleveland County
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A stricter reading limits matches to tornadoes formally recorded as occurringInCounty Cleveland.

predictions.question: What is the difference between how many storm events were recorded in each state between the year the COVID pandemic started and one decade earlier?
How many and which hurricanes made landfall in Louisiana in the month of August across all years, and when did they make landfall?
What is the ratio of tornadoes to hurricanes to thunderstorms to wildfires in Florida and California?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo: <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT ?statePostal ?category (COUNT(?event) AS ?cnt)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?statePostal { "FL" "CA" }
  ?state goo:statePostalCode ?statePostal .
  ?event a goo:StormEventRecord ;
         goo:occurredInState ?state ;
         goo:stormEventType ?eventType .
  BIND (
    IF(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?eventType)), "tornado"), "Tornado",
    IF(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?eventType)), "hurricane"), "Hurricane",
    IF(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?eventType)), "thunderstorm"), "Thunderstorm",
    IF(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?eventType)), "wildfire"), "Wildfire", ""))))
    AS ?category
  )
  FILTER (?category != "")
}
GROUP BY ?statePostal ?category
ORDER BY ?statePostal ?category

predictions.question: Which storm events in Florida started before same-county EAGLE-I records that later exceeded 50,000 outages on the same day?
Which NTL images and severity maps provide multimodal evidence for Florida county outage records above 100,000 during the Irma response window?
If Fort Myers's County's outage impact extended to neighboring counties during Hurricane Ian, which neighboring counties had high social vulnerability and high recorded outages?

sparql_interpretations.label: Moderate-high thresholds (SVI >= 0.75, outages > 10K)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'high' interpreted as SVI >= 0.75 and outage records exceeding 10,000.

sparql_interpretations.label: Strict-high thresholds (SVI >= 0.85, outages > 50K)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A stricter reading raises both thresholds to top-15% SVI and outages > 50,000.

predictions.question: Which Atlantic and Pacific hurricanes lasted more than three days and reached maximum sustained winds of an extremely powerful cyclone?

sparql_interpretations.label: Saffir-Simpson Category 5 threshold (>= 137 kt)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'extremely powerful cyclone' interpreted as Category 5 (>= 137 knots).

sparql_interpretations.label: Major hurricane (Cat 4+) threshold (>= 113 kt)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'Extremely powerful' may also include Category 4 storms (>= 113 knots).

predictions.question: Which counties in the state bordering Alabama and Georgia had an SVI overall score of at least 0.8 in the year before 2023 and a number of storm events recorded that same year?
predictions.sparql_query:
PREFIX goo: <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT ?county (COUNT(DISTINCT ?event) AS ?numEvents) ?svi
WHERE {
  ?state goo:statePostalCode "FL" .
  ?state goo:neighboringStates ?al .
  ?al goo:statePostalCode "AL" .
  ?state goo:neighboringStates ?ga .
  ?ga goo:statePostalCode "GA" .
  ?county goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?sviRec a goo:SVIRecord ;
          goo:representsCounty ?county ;
          goo:sviYear 2022 ;
          goo:sviOverallScore ?svi .
  FILTER (?svi >= 0.8)
  ?event a goo:StormEventRecord ;
         goo:occurredInCounty ?county ;
         goo:eventStartTime ?eventStart .
  FILTER (YEAR(?eventStart) = 2022)
}
GROUP BY ?county ?svi
ORDER BY DESC(?numEvents)
LIMIT 10

predictions.question: For the administrative divisions in the U.S. with the highest Social Vulnerability Indexes, what was their SVI at the start of the new millennium, then one decade later, then one decade after that, and what was their population increase in those two decades, and their poverty levels?
Which states have the highest number of hurricane landfalls across all years, and what is each state’s average county-level SVI overall score?
On the day of the Moore tornado, how many tornado records occurred within 50 km of Cleveland County, Oklahoma, and what were their EF ratings and injury counts?

sparql_interpretations.label: GeoSPARQL distance <= 50 km
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: use geosparql:hasGeometry / geof:distance to enforce 50,000-metre proximity precisely.

sparql_interpretations.label: Lat/lon degree approximation
sparql_interpretations.rationale: When WKT geometries are unavailable, approximate 50 km with ~0.45 deg lat / ~0.55 deg lon thresholds.

predictions.question: Which NTL images and outage-severity maps provide multimodal evidence for Florida county outage records above 250,000 during Hurricane Ian's immediate landfall impact window?

If the county where Hurricane Helene made landfall's outage impact propagated to neighboring counties, which neighboring counties' latest SVI overall scores were substantial and had outage records above 10,000 during the immediate landfall window?
Which counties in states neighboring Florida had 2022 SVI housing-and-transportation scores of at least 0.85 and at least five flood-related storm events that same year?

For the southeastern most state's administrative divisions with the highest 2022 SVI housing-and-transportation scores, what were their SVI overall scores in 2000, 2010, and 2022, their population change from 2000 to 2022, and their 2022 poverty rates?
Which Gulf Coast states have the highest number of hurricane landfalls in this century, and what is each state's average county-level SVI overall score?
On the day of the Joplin tornado, how many tornado records occurred in or within the general area of the Joplin county, and what were their EF ratings and death counts?
Which counties with high overall SVI scores had a Flood event occur after a Thunderstorm Wind event started within a few days in the same county, and what were the paired event times and SVI scores?

sparql_interpretations.label: Few days = 3-day window
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'within a few days' interpreted as a 3-day co-occurrence window.

sparql_interpretations.label: Few days = 5-day window
sparql_interpretations.rationale: 'A few days' may also stretch to 5 days, capturing slower-onset flood responses.

predictions.question: Which counties with high housing and transportation SVI theme scores had a Flash Flood event occur after a Hail event started within about half a day in the same county, and what were the paired event times and SVI theme scores?
Which counties in the hurricane-prone state had high socioeconomic vulnerability in a recent year and a dozen or so wind-related storm events recorded that same year?

sparql_interpretations.label: Loose dozen (>= 10)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: Default: 'a dozen or so' interpreted loosely as at least 10 events.

sparql_interpretations.label: Exact dozen (>= 12)
sparql_interpretations.rationale: A stricter reading interprets 'a dozen' as exactly 12 events or more.
